headline: **MLB Daily Roundup: May 10, 2026**
article:
The Toronto Blue Jays dominated the Los Angeles Angels in a one-sided matchup, securing a 14-1 victory. Brandon Valenzuela led the Angels' offense with 4 hits, 1 home run, and 4 RBIs.

Several key players are dealing with injuries, impacting their team's availability. Los Angeles Dodgers right-handed pitcher Brock Stewart has been placed on the 15-day injured list due to a left foot bone spur. San Francisco Giants right-handed pitcher Logan Webb was also placed on the 15-day injured list retroactive to May 6, 2026, with right knee bursitis. Other notable injured players include Milwaukee Brewers left fielder Brandon Lockridge, Los Angeles Dodgers second baseman Tommy Edman, Houston Astros right-handed pitcher Hunter Brown, Houston Astros left-handed pitcher Bennett Sousa, Minnesota Twins right-handed pitcher Taj Bradley, and Los Angeles Dodgers right-handed pitcher Tyler Glasnow.

Several teams made roster moves, including trades and injured list placements. The San Francisco Giants acquired left-handed pitcher Matt Wilkinson from the Cleveland Guardians in exchange for catcher Patrick Bailey. The Baltimore Orioles acquired right-handed pitchers Enyel Garcia and Maicol Lauriano from the Philadelphia Phillies for cash. The Chicago Cubs acquired right-handed pitcher Tyler Ferguson from the Athletics.

top_news.title: **Blue Jays Rout Angels 14-1**
top_news.summary: The Toronto Blue Jays dominated the Los Angeles Angels in a one-sided matchup, securing a 14-1 victory. Brandon Valenzuela led the Angels' offense with 4 hits, 1 home run, and 4 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Athletics Take Down Orioles 6-2**
top_news.summary: The Oakland Athletics secured a 6-2 victory over the Baltimore Orioles, with Brent Rooker leading the offense and Aaron Civale dominating on the mound. Civale earned the win with 5.0 innings pitched, 6 strikeouts, and 0 earned runs.

top_news.title: **Astros Fall to Reds in Cincinnati**
top_news.summary: The Houston Astros suffered a 1-3 loss to the Cincinnati Reds, with Braden Shewmake leading the Astros' offense with a home run and an RBI. Spencer Arrighetti pitched 5.2 innings for the Astros, striking out five and allowing one earned run.

top_news.title: **Marlins Come from Behind to Win 8-7**
top_news.summary: The Miami Marlins rallied to take the lead in the late innings, ultimately defeating the Washington Nationals 8-7. Kyle Stowers led the Nationals' offense with 3 hits, including a home run, while Richard Lovelady pitched 2 scoreless innings for the Nationals.

top_news.title: **Dodgers RHP Brock Stewart Lands on 15-Day IL**
top_news.summary: Los Angeles Dodgers right-handed pitcher Brock Stewart has been placed on the 15-day injured list due to a left foot bone spur. The injury occurred on May 9, 2026.

top_news.title: **Giants Acquire Left-Handed Pitcher in Trade**
top_news.summary: The San Francisco Giants made a move on May 9, 2026, acquiring left-handed pitcher Matt Wilkinson from the Cleveland Guardians in exchange for catcher Patrick Bailey.
